headline: Medtronic’s New MiniMed Go Highlights Digital Diabetes Push And Valuation Gap
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) has launched its MiniMed Go Smart MDI system with the Simplera sensor in Europe. The system connects the InPen smart insulin pen and a continuous glucose sensor into a single mobile app for diabetes management. This marks the first commercial launch in Europe of an integrated smart pen and sensor solution managed within one app. For Medtronic, a major player in medical devices, this launch adds another connected product to its diabetes-care portfolio. The MiniMed Go...
